zh.Widworthy, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文維德沃希
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Wotton於1402年1月10日出生在英國戴文維德沃希時，她的父親John Wotton46歲，母親Gundred Wyget27歲。她於1420年與Sir John Chichester在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年12月13日在英國戴文皮爾頓享年35歲。

zh-hans.Widworthy, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文維德沃希
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Wotton于1402年1月10日出生在英国戴文維德沃希时，她的父亲John Wotton46岁，母亲Gundred Wyget27岁。她于1420年与Sir John Chichester在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年12月13日在英国戴文皮爾頓享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Wotton was born on 10 January 1402, in Widworthy, Devon, England, her father, John Wotton, was 46 and her mother, Gundred Wyget, was 27. She married Sir John Chichester in 1420, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 December 1437, in Pilton, Devon, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Wotton est née le 10 janvier 1402, à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Wotton, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gundred Wyget, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Chichester en 1420, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1437, à Pilton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Wotton am 10. Januar 1402 in Widworthy, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wotton 46 und ihre Mutter Gundred Wyget 27. Sie hat 1420 in Devon, England Sir John Chichester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1437 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Pilton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wotton è nata il il 10 gennaio 1402 nel Widworthy, Devon, England, sua padre, John Wotton, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Gundred Wyget, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Chichester nel 1420, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1437, nel Pilton, Devon, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.Widworthy, Devon, England: イギリスデボンウィドウオルシー
ja.lifeSummary: Alice Wottonが1402年1月10日にイギリスデボンウィドウオルシーで生まれた時，父John Wottonは46歳，母Gundred Wygetは27歳であった。1420年にイギリスデボンでSir John Chichesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年12月13日にイギリスデボンピルトンで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Wotton(이)가 1402년 1월 10일 영국 데폰 위드워시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wotton(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gundred Wyget(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 데폰에서 Sir John Chichester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 12월 13일 영국 데폰 피턴에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 January 1402–13 December 1437: 10 de janeiro de 1402–13 de dezembro de 1437
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wotton nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1402, em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wotton, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Gundred Wyget, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Chichester em 1420, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1437, em Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Wotton родилась 10 января 1402 г. в местности видворти, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wotton было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundred Wyget, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Chichester в 1420 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 декабря 1437 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.10 January 1402–13 December 1437: 10 de enero de 1402–13 de diciembre de 1437
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Wotton nació el 10 de enero de 1402, en Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wotton, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Gundred Wyget, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir John Chichester en 1420, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1437, en Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
